channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: The FCC just said ‘No’ to SpaceX for now
item.description: SpaceX was dealt a new setback on April 23, 2006 by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) after the U.S. government agency dismissed the company’s petition to access a Mobile Satellite Service spectrum that would allow direct-to-device (D2D) capabilities. The FCC regulates communications by...

item.title: Tesla launches solution to end Supercharger fights once and for all
item.description: Tesla is launching its solution to end Supercharger fights once and for all, eliminating any confusion on who is to charge next at a congested location. Last year, a notable incident at a Tesla Supercharger led to a fight , and it all stemmed from a disagreement over who arrived at the location f...

item.title: Tesla offers awesome Free Supercharging incentive on an unexpected vehicle
item.description: Tesla is offering an awesome new Free Supercharging incentive on a vehicle that is sort of unexpected. In the past, Tesla has used Free Supercharging to incentivize the purchase of its expensive vehicles, like the Model S and Model X. However, those vehicles are leaving the company lineup , and T...

item.title: Jim Cramer on Tesla: “I’m Not a Seller of the Future, I’m a Buyer of the Future”
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Cramer mentioned that selling the stock is akin to selling the future, as he commented: Look, Tesla reported, alright?

item.title: Mark Your Calendar -- the SpaceX IPO Should Occur by This Date
item.description: SpaceX could go public at a $1.75 trillion valuation.

item.title: Elon Musk: America will '1,000%' go bankrupt due to debt — here’s what he claims can save the country
item.description: 'Nothing else will solve the national debt.'

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Ross Gerber Will Sell Some SpaceX Shares At $2 Trillion Valuation – 'How In God's Name Is It Worth So Much Money?'
item.description: A highly anticipated SpaceX IPO could make Elon Musk a trillionaire and reward any private shareholders of the space company, including Gerber Kawasaki CEO Ross Gerber. In an interview with Benzinga, Gerber says he's likely to sell his SpaceX shares based on extreme valuations being assigned to t...

item.title: Are Tesla's Earnings Telling the Full Story or Should Investors be Skeptical?
item.description: It's worth looking deeper into the "why" behind the numbers.

item.title: Morgan Stanley issues blunt take on Tesla stock after earnings
item.description: Morgan Stanley is still bullish on Tesla’s (TSLA) long-term story, but it doesn’t think investors should ignore the messy middle. Tesla released its Q1 2026 earnings report on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, to a mixed response, though the numbers looked good on the surface. According to Seeking ...

item.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan Is Excited About Partnering With Tesla On 14A Chips: 'Can Think Of No Better Partner' Than Elon Musk
item.description: In 2025, Intel Corp CEO Lip-Bu Tan said the company could exit its chip manufacturing business if it failed to secure external customers. Today, the company's shares surged as Elon Musk's Tesla Inc. signaled plans for a deal.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Cybercab Is Rolling Off The Line, But What Do Prediction Markets Say?
item.description: Elon Musk is telling investors the Cybercab is finally rolling off the line. Prediction market traders are pricing in a much slower story than the one Tesla is selling. Tesla Inc.

item.title: Ross Gerber Slams Elon Musk's Tesla For Phasing Out 'Best EV Ever' Amid Optimus Push: 'This Is Just Wrong'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki slammed Tesla Inc. on Thursday for winding down production of the premium Model S and Model X vehicles as the EV giant shifts towards robots. Best EV Ever In a post on the social media platform X, Gerber quoted a post by influencer Sawyer Merritt that share...

item.title: Tesla Is Down After Its Earnings Report. Time to Buy?
item.description: The electric-vehicle company is entering a period of heavy investment, and investors will need some patience.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab gets crazy change as mass production begins
item.description: Tesla Cybercab has evidently received a pretty crazy change from an aesthetic standpoint, as the company has made the decision to offer an additional finish on the vehicle as mass production is starting. Tesla has officially kicked off mass production of its groundbreaking Cybercab robotaxi at Gi...

item.title: Dan Ives: Tesla Is ‘Morphing into a Physical AI Stalwart’ So Don’t Sweat the CapEx and Just Buy TSLA Stock
item.description: Wedbush’s Dan Ives is bullish on Tesla despite its increasing CapEx.

item.title: Elon Musk makes shocking admission about Tesla
item.description: For years, Tesla sold millions of cars with a promise attached: Pay extra for Full Self-Driving, and your vehicle would eventually drive itself. Software updates would get it there. The hardware was ready.

item.title: Roth Capital Analysts: What Matters Most for Tesla Stock Now Isn’t Tesla… It’s SpaceX
item.description: Analysts at Roth Capital believe Tesla’s narrative is shifting. Right now, it’s SpaceX that’s commanding the spotlight.

item.title: Tesla confirms Cybercab with no steering wheel enters production
item.description: Tesla has confirmed today that its steering wheel-less and pedal-less Cybercab, the vehicle geared toward launching the company’s autonomous ride-hailing hopes, has officially entered production at its Giga Texas production facility outside of Austin. The Cybercab is a sleek two-door, two-passeng...

item.title: PG&E Tesla Cybertruck Partnership Tests Vehicle To Grid Future For Investors
item.description: PG&E (NYSE:PCG) received approval in California for the first AC vehicle to grid integration using Tesla Cybertrucks. The partnership allows Cybertruck owners to send power back to the grid through bidirectional charging. The program is designed to support grid resilience during outages or period...

item.title: Is Tesla’s New Lower-Priced SUV a Good Investment for Retirees?
item.description: Read on to find out if Tesla's new lower-priced SUV would be a good option for retirees.

item.title: Tesla Is Killing The Model S. But Its Legacy Is Everywhere
item.description: After 14 years, the Model S is bowing out. But the car industry it helped create will continue living in its shadow.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxis And Optimus Shift Focus To AI Revenue After 2027
item.description: Tesla has started production of its Cybercab robotaxi and is preparing for mass-scale manufacturing of its Optimus humanoid robot. Elon Musk has signaled that meaningful revenue from robotaxis and autonomy may not arrive until 2027. Tesla now expects that millions of its vehicles will need hardwa...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Optimus V3 Unveil To Be Closer To Robot's Production As Rivals 'Copy' Everything Tesla Does
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk on Wednesday accused rivals in the Humanoid Robot space of copying the EV giant’s robotics technology. Frame-By-Frame Analysis During the earnings call with investors, Musk was asked about the progress of the next generation of Optimus robots.

item.title: Tesla offers 1 year of free Supercharging, claims ~40% premium for non-Tesla EVs
item.description: Tesla is bringing back free Supercharging for new Model 3 Premium and Performance orders in North America, bundling one year of complimentary charging with new purchases. The automaker also used the announcement to take a shot at non-Tesla EV owners using the Supercharger network, claiming they p...

item.title: Are Robotaxis Coming to a City Near You?
item.description: Tesla is expanding its robotaxi offerings, plus serial acquirer QXO has made a transformative $17 billion acquisition of TopBuild to create the second-largest player in the construction industry.

item.title: Podcast: Tesla’s disaster earnings, Beijing Auto Show is mad, new EVs galore
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla’s disaster earnings, the Beijing Auto Show being absolutely insane, and a plethora of new EVs unveiled this week. more…

item.title: ETFs to Watch as Tesla Shares Slump Despite Q1 Earnings Beat
item.description: TSLA slides despite a Q1 earnings beat as a $5B capex hike tied to AI and Robotaxi ambitions rattles sentiment, pushing investors toward ETF consideration.

item.title: Will Tesla’s US$25 Billion AI and Robotaxi Bet in 2026 Change Tesla's (TSLA) Narrative
item.description: Tesla reported first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$22.39 billion and net income of US$477 million, beating profit expectations while confirming a sharp ramp-up in spending on AI, robotaxis, humanoid robots, and chip manufacturing. The company has begun early Cybercab robotaxi production...

item.title: Tesla Is Making a $2 Billion Bet on Hardware as AI-Focused SpaceX IPO Draws Near. Is TSLA Stock Safe to Buy?
item.description: Tesla looks profitable now, but its next move may depend on whether AI hardware can justify the spend.

item.title: Tesla's Unsold EVs Pile Up, Fastest-Growing Business Shrinks 40% — Elon Musk Must Explain Tonight
item.description: Tonight, after the U.S. markets close, Elon Musk has a conference call to make. Tesla‘s first-quarter financial results are due, and the number of lingering questions ahead of that call is starting to look like the number of cars piling up on Tesla’s lots.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Draws $2 Trillion Valuation Interest On Starlink And Data Center Ambitions
item.description: Investor focus builds around satellite growth, direct-to-device expansion, and potential orbital data center revenue streams

item.title: Tesla Summon got insanely good in FSD v14.3.2 — Navigation? Not so much
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3.2 began rolling out to some owners earlier this week, and there are some notable improvements that came with this update. There were two new lines of improvements in the release notes: one addressing Actually Smart Summon (ASS), and another that now allows drivers to...

item.title: DZ Bank Upgrades Tesla From Sell to Hold: Is the Bear Case on Robotaxi Finally Cracking?
item.description: German research house DZ Bank lifted its rating on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) from Sell to Hold with a $385 price target, a two-notch shift that signals the firm’s bearish stance on the EV maker is finally softening. The call lands just two days after a Q1 FY2026 earnings beat and on the same day Tesla ...

item.title: Tesla: The Street Wrongly Hates The Capex Plan, AI & Robotics On Track
Tesla stock on track to end week lower after capex guidance spooks investors
item.description: Tesla is poised to finish the week lower, snapping a short-lived one-week winning streak as the company's Q1 earnings report raised some concerns for investors.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Results: Sales Stagnate, Risky Ventures Burn Through Cash
Tesla begins Cybercab robotaxi production at Giga Texas
item.description: CEO Elon Musk confirmed the launch on Tesla's Q1 2026 earnings call, though he warned initial output will be slow before ramping late in the year

item.title: Stock Market Holds Near Highs As Intel Leads Chip Surge; Apple, Tesla, ServiceNow In Focus: Weekly Review
item.description: The stock market held near highs this week as Intel and chipmakers offset ServiceNow and software woes. Apple CEO Tim Cook is leaving.

item.title: Tesla Is No Longer A Car Company
Tesla Just Disclosed That Its Pure Profit Center Will Dry Up Fast
item.description: Regulatory credits, still a big profit center for Tesla, should fall fast going forward, according to an SEC filing.

item.title: How Investors May Respond To Intel (INTC) Winning Tesla Terafab Deal Amid Restructuring-Driven Loss
item.description: Intel reported first-quarter 2026 results with revenue rising to US$13.58 billion from US$12.67 billion, but a larger net loss of US$3.73 billion driven primarily by about US$4.07 billion in restructuring and impairment charges, while guiding second‑quarter revenue to US$13.8–14.8 billion and dil...

item.title: Tesla plans to resolve its angriest bunch of owners: here’s how
item.description: Tesla has a plan to make Hardware 3 owners whole after CEO Elon Musk admitted that those with that self-driving chip in their cars will not have access to unsupervised Full Self-Driving. The company’s strategy is so crazy that it is sort of hard to believe. Since the rollout of the AI4 chip in Te...

item.title: What's next for Tesla
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) beat first quarter earnings and revenue estimates on Wednesday. Lossdog founder and CEO Tom Sosnoff, Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma discuss the results and stock moves with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises After Upgrade But Heads for Weekly Loss. The Stock Needs This.
item.description: It’s been a tough week for Tesla stock, with investors tired of waiting for truly self-driving cars. German financial company DZ Bank upgraded Tesla to Hold from Sell, according to Wall Street ratings aggregators. DZ didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

item.title: Tesla announces Cybercab production has begun
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) has begun manufacturing its Cybercab robotaxi, according to CEO Elon Musk, marking a key milestone in the company’s effort to expand into autonomous ride-hailing services amid a broader slowdown in electric vehicle demand. Musk said on Friday via the social media...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Invested $2 Billion Into SpaceX, Q1 2026 Earnings Show
item.description: Tesla Inc.‘s ties to Elon Musk-led SpaceX just got deeper with a new investment in the commercial space flight company amid Terafab collaboration. $2 Billion Investment In its quarterly earnings report released on Wednesday, the EV giant shared its investment in SpaceX. The EV giant’s report show...

item.title: Tesla begins Cybercab production as autonomy push takes shape
item.description: Cybercab production begins, but slowly

item.title: Why this Tesla bear still sees a 60% crash in the EV maker's stock
item.description: A Tesla bear stays on patrol.

item.title: Tesla Q1: CapEx Is Here, The Payoff Isn't Yet
Intel’s CEO Just Admitted Elon Musk Will Teach Them More Than They’ll Teach Him
item.description: Something rare happened on Intel (NASDAQ:INTC)’s earnings call. CEO Lip-Bu Tan effectively told investors that Elon Musk will teach Intel more about running a chip business than Intel will teach Musk. For a company that spent decades as the default answer in silicon, that’s a striking shift.
